TextRun.Text: is reported in the news, (非限定从)

RichText.Text: 1. fine sb. for 100 yuan fine sb. for speeding get a fine for speeding 2. see sb. do sth. sb. be seen to do sth. 3. It is generally accepted that... 4. the first/earliest country to play football 5. attend a party to be held next week 6. As is reported in the news, (非限定从) It is reported in the news that.... (it 形式主语) What is reported is that... (what主语从句) 7. provide an opportunity for sb. to do sth. 8. have a difficult time doing sth. have difficulty/trouble/fun doing sth. 9. one's approach to doing sth. 10. regret doing /having done sth. regret to do sth.

TextRun.Text: 3. 人们普遍认为…… （it形式主语）
4. 第一个/最早开展足球运动的国家
做某事有困难 / 费事 / 做得愉快

RichText.Text: 1. 罚款某人一百元 因超速处罚某人 因超速被罚款 2. 看见某人做某事 某人被看见做某事 3. 人们普遍认为…… （it形式主语） 4. 第一个/最早开展足球运动的国家 5. 参加下周即将举办的派对 6. 据新闻报道 据新闻报道…… 新闻所报道的是…… 7. 为某人提供做某事的机会 8. 做某事十分艰难 做某事有困难 / 费事 / 做得愉快 9. 某人做某事的方法 10. 后悔做过某事 遗憾要去做某事
